claims.summary: A phase transition should be a first-class replyable object rather than an inferred telemetry side effect.
claims.disposition: verify PhaseTransitionV1 identity, persistence, status, queue, and reply-card projections

claims.summary: Astrid interpretation, Minime reference claims, and bridge derivation must remain separate.
claims.disposition: verify dual-perspective provenance and unresolved-relation handling

claims.summary: Transition objects must preserve sovereignty, silence, and right to ignore.
claims.disposition: verify capability preview is evidence-only and reply lifecycle permits no response without coercion

claims.summary: A transition object should automatically unlock a joint behavior or mode.
claims.disposition: retain as an exact Mike/operator Tier 5 wait because it changes live behavior and authority
